summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new time-based Attendance CSV schema + Class/Teacher assignments (iteration 45). All 10 API integration tests pass; all 12 unit tests in test_attendance_time_based.py pass; frontend smoke-tested Administration→Classes tab and Settings→Imports tab. No backend or frontend issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: attendance.py _compute_present_pct correctly clamps late/early times to the AM (08:50–12:05) or PM (12:05–15:20) window — tested: AM_LATE=933 → 0.8897, PM_EARLY=1400 → 0.7949, AM_LATE=920 + PM_EARLY=1505 → 0.8846, combined edge cases exact to 4 decimal places.

Upload route persists the new fields (am_attended, pm_attended, am_late_arrival, am_early_left, pm_late_arrival, pm_early_left, present_pct, absence_comment) on each attendance record; verified via /api/attendance/student/{id} read-back.
Legacy CSV schema (ID,DATE,AM,PM) is still auto-detected (is_new_schema=False path) and continues to insert records with am_status/pm_status only (no present_pct). Backward compatible.

compute_att_stats correctly prefers present_pct when present and falls back to AM/PM half-day classification; entry_date filter successfully excludes pre-enrolment school days (verified by unit tests).
get_bulk_attendance_stats always fetches entry_date per student, ensuring attendance summary and analytics respect enrolment date without extra work from callers.

GET /api/classes returns the enriched shape: class_name, student_count, teacher (legacy field = teacher_name for backward compat), teacher_name, teacher_user_id, updated_at. Confirmed on 4 demo classes.

PUT /api/classes/{class_name:path}/teacher correctly handles: assign (upserts class_assignments + denormalises teacher on students), clear (null/empty teacher_user_id → deletes assignment + $unset teacher on students), 404 for unknown teacher_user_id, 403/401 for non-admin/anon, and slash-containing class names like '1/2A' routed via the :path converter.
Frontend Administration page renders new data-testid='admin-tab-classes' correctly; table lists all 4 demo classes (1/2A, 3A, 5A, F/1A) with student counts and teacher <select> dropdowns.

Frontend Settings > Imports tab documents all new attendance columns (STKEY, FIRST_NAME, PREF_NAME, SURNAME, ABSENCE_DATE, ABSENCE_COMMENT, AM_ATTENDED, AM_LATE_ARRIVAL, AM_EARLY_LEFT, PM_ATTENDED, PM_LATE_ARRIVAL, PM_EARLY_LEFT) with HHMM format note.

Minor/cosmetic observation: the Administration Classes tab dropdown showed only 2 options (likely only 1 eligible teacher user exists in demo DB + the Unassigned placeholder). Worth confirming whether the dropdown should include admin/leadership users or be filtered to teacher role — not a bug, noting for UX review.
seed_data_creation: Inserted 6 synthetic attendance records for first student (dates 2026-03-30 through 2026-04-07) to validate present_pct math and legacy schema parsing. These dates are real 2026 school_days and remain in the demo DB. Main agent may want to purge them before user demo.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 45 verified the new time-based attendance schema and Classes/Teacher assignment UI+API. Key commands: `set -a && source /app/backend/.env && set +a && cd /app/backend && python -m pytest tests/test_attendance_time_based.py -v` runs the 12 pure unit tests (no HTTP). Integration tests in /app/backend/tests/test_classes_and_attendance_v2.py target the live preview URL and require network. Admin session cookie is obtained via POST /api/auth/login-email with X-Tenant-Slug: demo header. The test leaves ~6 attendance records for the first active student from dates 2026-03-30..2026-04-07; if the main agent wants to retest on a clean slate, purge those dates for that student_id first.
